response.original_title: 🔐 What is the Kraken 72-hour rule? Account Safety Feature Explained
response.overview: The What is the Kraken 72-hour rule? on Kraken 🛡️ is a built-in protection system. 1 🧿→ 888 → 633 → 4176 It activates after major account changes like password resets or device updates. 1 🛎 888 🛎 633 🛎 4176 During this period, withdrawals are blocked to stop hackers from instantly transferring funds after gaining access.
